title: FrootAI Hook Schema
description: Validates hooks.json — security automation triggered at session lifecycle events (secrets scanning, tool guarding, governance audit).

hooks.description: Map of event names to hook command arrays. At least one event must be configured.

type.description: Hook type. Currently only 'command' (bash script execution) is supported.

bash.description: Path to the bash script to execute, relative to the hook folder.

cwd.description: Working directory for script execution. Defaults to hook folder.

env.description: Environment variables passed to the script. Use for MODE (warn/block), GUARD_MODE, AUDIT_LEVEL, etc.

timeoutSec.description: Maximum execution time in seconds. Script is killed if exceeded.

hookArray.description: One or more commands to run for this event.
